Input Parameters

X-Direction Spans (m)

Y-Direction Spans (m)

Floors

If unchecked, GF slab loads are excluded (typical for ground-bearing slabs)
Ground Floor
Typical

Material & Member Sizing

B is plan X/width. H/D is plan Y/depth. Set to 0 for auto-sizing per NSCP rules.

Footing Parameters

Footings and tie beams enabled

Cantilevers (m)

Enter cantilever length per span (0 = no cantilever)

AI Structural Assistant (Kimi)

                

                

                    

                        
                        
                        
                    

                    

                        
Ask anything about your structural design. The AI
                            sees your project data (spans, loads, member sizes, design results). Try:

                            - "Review my column sizes, are they adequate?"

                            - "What's the most critical member?"

                            - "Suggest improvements for my footing layout"

                            - "Write a structural narrative for my report"

                beams below.
